title: Management Complete Guide - Succeed in Leadership Roles
description:
Investing time in your management skills will pay dividends for you and your team (and your boss!), yet most people never study management in any scientific way. Excellent management is actually easy to learn, but trying to pick it up by copying good or bad leaders is surprisingly difficult. Improvising as you go rarely leads to consistently effective results.

As a leader, there’s a lot on your plate. You’re expected to lead a team, make tough decisions, delegate work (without micromanaging!), and somehow keep everyone happy and productive. On top of that, you need to delegate properly, avoid burnout, and make your boss think you’ve got everything under control. The good news? This course is here to help.

You’ll learn the difference between management and leadership, how to delegate effectively, what your leadership options are, how to motivate different types of people, and when to empower others without slipping into abdication.

I designed this course specifically for people just like you—those thrown into the deep end of leadership who want practical advice that works right now. Whether you’re managing a small team or leading in a large organization, I’ll give you the tools and strategies you need to succeed.

You’ll love this course because it isn’t a boring list of “dos and don’ts.” It’s packed with real-world, practical advice that’s been tested by thousands of managers I’ve worked with. I’m Chris Croft, and with over 20 years of experience, I specialize in making leadership simple, practical, and even a bit fun.
